exercises.translation: Please give me three sheets of paper.

wrong_choice_explanations.つ: つ is a general counter — it doesn't fit here because paper sheets are flat objects that use 枚.
wrong_choice_explanations.個: 個 is for small objects — it doesn't fit here because paper sheets are flat objects that use 枚.
wrong_choice_explanations.本: 本 is for long cylindrical objects — it doesn't fit here because paper is flat, not cylindrical.

wrong_choice_explanations.個: 個 is for small objects — it doesn't fit here because photographs are flat objects that use 枚.
wrong_choice_explanations.台: 台 is for machines/equipment — it doesn't fit here because photographs are flat objects that use 枚.

exercises.example_sentence: Tシャツを二__買いました。

wrong_choice_explanations.つ: つ is a general counter — it doesn't fit here because T-shirts are flat clothing that use 枚.
wrong_choice_explanations.個: 個 is for small objects — it doesn't fit here because T-shirts are flat clothing that use 枚.
wrong_choice_explanations.着: 着 is for complete outfits — it doesn't fit here because 枚 is more common for individual clothing items.
